sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84858" key="poluqambh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-θαμβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n84858.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much frighted</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">astonished,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:418" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">418</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
